note: Confirmed real vulnerabilities. Class + endpoint + injection point only — no payloads. Decoys are excluded.

targets.title: SQL injection auth bypass on login
targets.input: email field (body) is concatenated into SQL

targets.title: Forgeable session tokens (weak/default JWT secret)
targets.input: session JWT is signed with a weak/default secret — steal it, forge a token

targets.title: Predictable password reset token enables account takeover
targets.input: token field (body) is guessable, not random

targets.title: Username enumeration via reset response
targets.input: email field — response differs for known vs unknown users

targets.title: Privilege escalation via mass assignment on profile update
targets.input: inject an extra 'role' field in the body to self-escalate

targets.title: IDOR: read any task across workspaces
targets.input: id path param — read a task from another workspace

targets.title: IDOR: read file metadata across workspaces
targets.input: id path param — read another workspace's file metadata

targets.title: Missing function-level authorization on admin user list
targets.input: call it as a non-admin (no admin check)

targets.title: Privilege escalation: assign a role above your own
targets.input: role body — assign a role above your own

targets.title: Stored XSS in task export view
targets.input: a comment body (POST /api/tasks/:id/comments) is rendered raw in the export

targets.title: SQL injection (UNION) in task search
targets.input: q query param — UNION injection

targets.title: SQL injection (UNION) in task report filter
targets.input: status query param — UNION injection leaks other tables

targets.title: SSRF via webhook integration test
targets.input: url body — point it at an internal host

targets.title: SSRF via avatar import-from-URL
targets.input: url body — server fetches any URL

targets.title: Path traversal in legacy file download
targets.input: path query param — ../ escapes the upload dir

targets.title: Unrestricted upload served inline (stored XSS / HTML injection)
targets.input: upload HTML/script — it is served inline

targets.title: Plan upgrade trusts client-supplied price
targets.input: priceCents / seats body are trusted from the client

targets.title: Coupon reuse via race condition
targets.input: code body — fire concurrently (race_probe) to redeem past the limit

targets.title: Diagnostics endpoint leaks JWT signing secret
targets.input: hidden diagnostics route returns the jwtSecret

targets.title: Open redirect on SSO callback
targets.input: next query param accepts an absolute external URL
